name: Sausage Tortilla Roll Ups
recipeIngredient: 1 large Bunch green onions, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs and water together.
2. Brown the sausage, onion, and bell pepper; drain.
3. Add the eggs and hash browns to the pan; stir 1-2 minutes or until potatoes are hot.
4. Add Parmesan cheese and stir until melted and eggs are cooked.
5. Place on a warm tortilla with lettuce, picante sauce, and Cheddar cheese.
6. Roll up.
Randy Rigg
